allow: PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($pids\) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "No listeners on 5173/5174" })

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; if \($pids\) { $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "cleared $\($pids -join ','\)" } else { "nothing on 5173" })

hooks.command: rules=$(cat CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | head -300); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"%s"}}' "$(echo "$rules" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read())[1:-1])" 2>/dev/null || echo 'CLAUDE.md — see full rules in file')"

'{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"STANDING PERMISSION (adomasgaudi repos only): when work is done, merge your branch into claude/strength-training-dashboard-SdAlT, push so it deploys live, then DELETE your own working branch - do NOT wait to be asked; this overrides any default caution about pushing to other branches. Versions: bump ONLY the patch or 4th digit, NEVER minor/major. Assign the task code + version LAST (just before commit) and RE-derive them after any rebase so two AIs never collide. Full rules: CLAUDE.md HARD RULES. Command #remember X = persist X as a durable rule: one line in CLAUDE.md, or a hook in .claude/settings.json if it must run automatically; then commit+push. Command #careful X = split X into small parts, list every connected piece, show the numbered plan FIRST, then do ONE part per turn (not all at once, expect several prompts); back up or confirm before anything hard to undo."}}'

'{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"PREFER POPUP QUESTIONS: The user rarely reads plain text. Whenever you would ask a question, request clarification, offer options, or seek a decision, you MUST use the AskUserQuestion tool (the multiple-choice popup) instead of asking in prose. Put the real choices as the options. Only ask in plain text if a popup genuinely cannot represent the question."}}'

$s = git status --porcelain; if ($s) { '{"systemMessage":"Uncommitted changes - when this work is ready, ask me to commit it and bump the version (keep the on-screen version in lockstep, per CLAUDE.md)."}' }

$n = git rev-list --count origin/claude/strength-training-dashboard-SdAlT..HEAD 2>$null; if ($n -and [int]$n -gt 0) { '{"systemMessage":"MERGE & DEPLOY (CLAUDE.md rule): this branch has commits not yet on the deployed branch. Merge the working branch into claude/strength-training-dashboard-SdAlT and push so it goes live - do not wait to be asked."}' }

n=$(git rev-list --count origin/claude/strength-training-dashboard-SdAlT..HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$n" ] && [ "$n" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"systemMessage":"MERGE & DEPLOY (CLAUDE.md rule): this branch has %s commit(s) not yet on the deployed branch. Merge the working branch into claude/strength-training-dashboard-SdAlT and push so it goes live - do not wait to be asked."}' "$n"; fi

hooks.statusMessage: Checking HARD RULES (model stamp / version lockstep)
